sentence: go to a news site, accept the cookie consent banner if one appears, then open the top headline

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab and navigate to a news site.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: Handle Cookie Consent
workflow.description: Accept the cookie consent banner if it appears on the news site.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news
If a button with text 'Yes, I agree' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Yes, I agree'

workflow.name: On News Homepage
workflow.description: Locate and click the top headline on the news site.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news
If a heading with text 'Top Stories' is visible
If a link with an aria-label containing 'Read more about' is visible
actions: Click the first link with an aria-label containing 'Read more about'

workflow.name: Headline Article Page
workflow.description: Confirm that the top headline article page has loaded.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news/
If the page title contains ' - BBC News'
If a heading with text 'Related Topics' is visible
actions: Terminate: The top headline article has been opened.
